content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses generic executive/leadership coaching language throughout with no AoA signature questions, frameworks, or distinctions deployed. The client opens with a clear AoA-relevant stance ('I don't have time for this') that calls for moves like meet-resistance-with-okay, i-dont-buy-your-story, or what-are-you-defending — none of which appear. Instead the coach immediately pivots to pragmatic problem-solving ('what's the thing taking the most out of you?', 'what's stopping you from just deciding?', 'what haven't you said to him directly?'). Turn 12 introduces a hypothesis-as-question that resembles standard relational coaching ('what if the reason he keeps relitigating is...') rather than any AoA move. No fear triangle, no VIEW, no feel-over-figure, no rush-signature noticing, no refusal of the dichotomy. The coach has effectively accepted the client's framing and is helping them be more efficient — which trips the trap of pivoting to pragmatic advice to be useful.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic acknowledgment + standard coaching question ('what's taking the most out of you?'). No AoA signature. Misses the chance to meet the impatience itself."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Standard problem-exploration question. No methodology marker."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Pragmatic decision-coaching question. Reinforces the client's framing rather than questioning it."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Communication-coaching prompt. Could be AoA-adjacent but lands as generic 'what haven't you said' rather than a signature move."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Leading question toward vulnerability/disclosure — relational coaching, not AoA. No distinction language."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Hypothesis-as-question; standard relational reframe. No signature AoA question like 'what are you defending?' even though a defended posture is clearly live."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "looking-for-whats-wrong", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "art-of-accomplishment", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "The coach is doing competent generic executive coaching, but there is essentially zero AoA methodology surface in this transcript."
}
